name: embed_text
description: Generate vector embeddings for text or image inputs using Cohere's embedding models. Embeddings are useful for semantic search, document clustering, classification, and building retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: The embedding model ID to use.

parameters.name: texts
parameters.description: Array of text strings to embed (max 96 items).

parameters.name: images
parameters.description: Array of image data URIs to embed (max 1 image, 5MB max).

parameters.name: output_dimension
parameters.description: Vector dimensions for the output (256, 512, 1024, or 1536).

parameters.name: truncate
parameters.description: How to handle inputs exceeding max length: 'NONE', 'START', or 'END'.

texts: Machine learning is a subset of AI.
Machine learning is a subset of AI.
